title: Wire Airtable Library to n8n — create credential and update audit workflow
description: Create the Airtable Library credential in n8n using the PAT stored in Infisical. Update wf_audit_snapshot_daily to POST audit snapshots to the Signals table. Add Airtable search node to workspace-router to query Articles before responding.
impact: n8n agents gain access to structured knowledge base. Audit snapshots become queryable records instead of log files.

title: Update OpenClaw TOOLS.md with Airtable Library API endpoints
description: Add Airtable REST API curl examples to /docker/openclaw-xbkt/data/.openclaw/workspace/TOOLS.md so the main agent can query Articles and Problems tables before answering operational questions. Add rule to SOUL.md: check Library first.
impact: OpenClaw becomes a knowledge-first agent. Reduces hallucination on ops questions. Answers are grounded in verified runbooks.

title: Update learning_ingest.sh to POST signals to Airtable Signals table
description: Modify /root/VizionAI/WORKSPACES/vizion-infra/scripts/learning_ingest.sh to additionally POST ingested signals to the Airtable Library Signals table via REST API after writing local file. Use AIRTABLE_LIBRARY_TOKEN and AIRTABLE_LIBRARY_BASE_ID from environment.
impact: All ingested signals become visible in Airtable for triage. Eliminates need to SSH into VPS to check ingest queue.

title: Update learning_promote.sh to PATCH Airtable Articles/Problems on promotion
description: Modify /root/VizionAI/WORKSPACES/vizion-infra/scripts/learning_promote.sh to PATCH corresponding Airtable records to status=active when a local learning entry is promoted. Requires matching by title or a stored Airtable record ID.
impact: Airtable Library stays in sync with local learning plane automatically. No manual double-entry needed.

title: Create wf_library_sync_weekly n8n workflow
description: Build new n8n workflow that runs Sunday 03:00 UTC. Reads vizion-infra/learning/ markdown files, upserts Articles and Problems in Airtable Library, and sends a Telegram summary of what was synced/updated.
impact: Keeps local learning/ directory and Airtable Library in sync automatically. Reduces manual maintenance overhead.

title: Import pre-populated CSVs into all 6 Airtable Library tables
description: Import the 6 generated CSV files into their respective Airtable tables: 01_services.csv (17 rows), 02_problems.csv (12 rows), 03_articles.csv (18 rows), 04_recommendations.csv, 05_signals.csv, 06_prompts.csv. Set field types correctly after import (single select, date, checkbox, number, URL).
impact: Library base becomes immediately useful with real data. Agents and operators have knowledge to query from day 1.

title: Set correct field types in all Airtable tables after CSV import
description: After CSV import, change field types in Airtable UI: category/status/severity/priority/workspace → Single select. tags/affected_services → Multi-select. first_seen/last_seen/created_at/updated_at/due_date → Date+time. verified → Checkbox. occurrence_count/view_count/helpfulness/host_port → Number. internal_url/external_url/health_check_url → URL.
impact: Correct field types enable filtering, sorting, grouping, and API querying by type. Required for Interfaces to work correctly.

title: Create 5 Airtable Interfaces (Knowledge Base Portal, Ops Dashboard, Ingest Queue, Service Registry, Prompt Library)
description: Build all 5 Interfaces in Airtable Interface Designer as specified in the Library design doc. Knowledge Base Portal: search + category tiles + recent articles. Ops Dashboard: summary counts + service status + signal queue. Ingest Queue: unprocessed signals list + promote buttons. Service Registry: filterable service cards. Prompt Library: filterable prompt viewer.
impact: Human operators get a no-code dashboard for ops visibility. Reduces need to write SQL or Airtable filter formulas manually.

title: Populate Services table with live health check data via n8n
description: Create or extend wf_health_check n8n workflow to PATCH Services records in Airtable: update status field and last_checked timestamp after each health check run. Requires Airtable credential + Services record IDs.
impact: Service Registry in Airtable shows real-time status. Operators can see degraded services in the Ops Dashboard without logging in to VPS.

title: Populate Prompts table with all 39 agent system prompts
description: Extract system prompt content from all 39 n8n agent workflow JSONs and OpenClaw SOUL.md files. Populate the Airtable Prompts table with name, agent, model, version, prompt_text, and category for each.
impact: Prompt Library enables version-controlled prompt management. Agents can query their own prompts from Airtable for dynamic updates without redeploying workflows.

title: Link related records across tables after CSV import
description: After all CSV imports are done, manually link related records: Articles ↔ Problems, Articles ↔ Services, Problems ↔ Services, Recommendations ↔ Articles, Recommendations ↔ Problems. Start with the 12 Problems linking to their relevant Services.
impact: Linked records enable cross-table navigation and rollup counts. Required for Interfaces to show related-record panels.
